items.summary: Kamala Harris's campaign is attacking opponents and Biden insulted supporters, showing a lack of love for Americans.
key_points: Kamala compares opponents to mass murderers
Biden called supporters garbage
Cannot lead without loving Americans

items.summary: A young USMC veteran was murdered by a Mexican cartel while driving through Mexico, and his family joined the speaker in Nevada.
key_points: Nicholas Quets, a USMC veteran, was killed by a Mexican cartel in Mexico.
The incident occurred while he was driving to a beach weekend with friends.
His family appeared with the speaker in Henderson, Nevada.

items.summary: Trump campaign urges Nevada voters to turn out and provides a voting information link.
key_points: Encourages voting in Nevada
Provides Trump campaign voting info link

items.summary: Trump thanks Nevada supporters, saying hardworking patriots built the country and will save it in 5 days.
key_points: Hardworking patriots built the country
They will save the country in 5 days
Thank you to Nevada supporters

items.summary: Trump thanks supporters in New Mexico, Nevada, and Arizona, urging them to vote to defeat Kamala and save America.
key_points: Great day in New Mexico, Nevada, and Arizona
Urges voting to 'Fire Kamala'
Aims to 'Save America'

items.summary: Trump promotes Steve Moore's book 'The Trump Economic Miracle' as a must-read for those interested in making America great again.
key_points: Book by Steve Moore details past achievements and future plans.
Endorsed by Donald Trump as a must-read.
Focuses on the 'Trump Economic Miracle' and making America great again.

items.summary: Melania's new book is a #1 NYT bestseller, praised by Donald Trump.

Trump calls it fantastic
Trump expresses pride in Melania

items.summary: Nate Silver accuses pollsters of manipulating data to keep the presidential race close.

Pollsters accused of 'putting finger on the scale'.
Allegations of lying to keep race close.

items.summary: Wishing a Blessed and Happy All Saints’ Day.
key_points: All Saints’ Day greeting
Blessed and happy wishes

items.summary: Mark Cuban criticized for comments about women, called a 'loser' with character flaws.
key_points: Mark Cuban criticized for comments about women's strength and intelligence.
He is described as weak, insecure, and a bad guy.
His apology is considered worthless.

items.summary: The post criticizes Liz Cheney as a war hawk lacking courage to fight, and condemns her father's actions in the Middle East.
key_points: Liz Cheney is a war hawk who wouldn't fight herself.
Her father profited from causing death in the Middle East.
Such people should not run the country.

items.summary: The post criticizes Kamala Harris and Joe Biden over job growth, claiming manufacturing job losses and a decline in American employment.
key_points: Jobs report called an embarrassment for the nation.
Claims Kamala lied about job growth and killed 46,000 manufacturing jobs.
773,000 Americans lost employment in the last year, with jobs taken by foreign-born workers.

Streaming on RSBN, OAN, Real America's Voice, Newsmax, and Rumble
MAGA2024 rally

items.summary: Robert Kennedy Jr. urges his supporters to vote for Donald Trump instead of himself.
